title: Spoon Set, 12-Piece Stainless Steel Dessert Spoons Dining Spoons, Mirror Polishing Cutlery Spoons Set,Dishwasher Safe (6.7 inches, 17cm)
features: 【Multi-function】 The spoon set of 12 is multifunctional, which can be used as dinner spoon, dessert spoon, soup spoon and so on, which is a nice choice for restaurants, bistro, cafe, roadhouse and hotel. If you’re looking for an inexpensive replacement without replacing entire everyday set, our set is really suitable for you.And If you need forks set, you can buy it in our store, we also has 12 pieces forks set.

【Healthy Material】 Made of food grade stainless steel, each of our stainless steel spoon is non-toxic and nickel free, which will ensure your eating health. The spoons set is rust-resistant and not bend easily thanks to the durable stainless steel. It’s a great alternative to the plastic spoons.

【Ergonomics Design】 Our dessert spoons have a nice weight and size, which is perfect for both adult and children. Proper gauge thickness and length ensure enough grip. These dessert spoons are ergonomically design to be comfortable to hold no matter what you’re eating.

【Dishwasher safe】 Clean and looking and mirror polish makes these spoons always keep shining. And the 12 piece spoons is dishwasher safe, and you can just put them in a dishwasher for saving time in hand washing.

【Pleafind's Promise】 Don’t worrying about buying the spoons set you don’t like. Pleafind is committed to providing customers with a satisfying shopping experience by offering high quality spoons cutlery and good value for money products. If you have any dissatisfaction, please feel free to contact us. We look forward to your feedback to make us do better!
